cp:coreProperties.dc:title: Tonka Time Weekend Mini Excavator Rental Agreement
cp:coreProperties.dc:subject: Reusable customer agreement template for backend variable merge and OpenSign signature/initial fields
cp:coreProperties.dc:creator: Tonka Time Rentals LLC
cp:coreProperties.dc:description: Customer-facing template. Merge {{variables}} before OpenSign; configure only initials, signature, and signing date in OpenSign.
